title: Navigating the Future of AI Law: Understanding the EU AI Act and AIDA
content:
## Navigating the Future of AI Law: Understanding the EU AI Act and AIDA
We are pleased to invite you to an exclusive event designed to help you navigate the implications of the European Union's AI Act and Canada's proposed Artificial Intelligence Data Act (AIDA). Our event will cover essential topics, including strategies to protect your business, and a jurisdictional overview to compare and contrast the impacts across different regions. We are thrilled to have a keynote address by John Buyers , Head of Artificial Intelligence at Osborne Clarke, London UK, offering an in-depth perspective on the EU AI Act. Complementing this session, a panel of McCarthy Tétrault experts will contribute their expertise, perspectives, and practical advice. The panel includes:
- Charles Morgan , National co-leader of our Cyber/Data Group and a renowned authority on responsible AI governance
- Dan Glover , National co-leader of our Cyber/Data Group and a leading advisor on AI and data privacy
- Barry Sookman , Senior Counsel and a prominent figure in AI regulation and compliance
- Alex Cocks , Partner, experienced litigator in class actions, civil and corporate commercial litigation, dispute resolution and cyber/data
- David Crane , Partner, a leading legal expert specializing in strategic technology-related transactions
- Karine Joizil , Partner, experienced litigator in class actions, civil and corporate commercial litigation, dispute resolution and cyber/data
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca . Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event. This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario. Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
